data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of pausing a subscription while keeping the time slot reserved. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the ability to pause the subscription for maternity leave, but without specific evidence demonstrating this capability, it indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the ability to pause the subscription while keeping the slot reserved.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to pause the subscription.
